summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PPL Board v3.0.0 with GPT-5.1 Web Search integration. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with 70 matches (1 Live, 63 Upcoming, 6 Completed). All tabs work, navigation to post-match and live match pages functional. noLiveMatch handling displays amber warning banner correctly.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection warning in console but functionality works
Chart width/height warnings in console but charts display correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns 200 with version 3.0.0 and dataSource GPT-5.1 Web Search
GET /api/ shows scheduleLoaded=true with 70 matches in DB
GET /api/data-source returns source=GPT-5.1 Web Search, model=gpt-5.1, tool=web_search_preview
GET /api/schedule returns 70 matches with proper categorization (1 Live, 63 Upcoming, 6 Completed)
Schedule matches have proper structure: matchId, team1, team2, team1Short, team2Short, status, dateTimeGMT
Completed matches have score and winner fields populated
Live match (CSK vs PBKS, ipl2026_007) has status=Live and score field
POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live returns live data or noLiveMatch flag
POST /api/matches/invalid_match_id/fetch-live returns error correctly
GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns match state
GET /api/squads returns 10 team squads
GET /api/squads/CSK returns team squad data
Frontend MatchSelector page loads with 3 tabs: Live (1), Upcoming (63), Completed (6)
Completed tab shows match cards with real scores and winners
Live tab shows CSK vs PBKS live match card with score
Clicking completed match navigates to /post-match/{matchId}
Clicking live match navigates to /live/{matchId}
Live match page shows Fetch Live Scores button
Live match page shows Algorithm Comparison chart with 5 algorithms
Live match page shows Algorithm Radar chart
Live match page shows Win Probability chart
Live match page shows GPT Analysis section
noLiveMatch handling shows amber warning banner with match result
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: 70 IPL 2026 matches loaded via GPT-5.1 web search (already in MongoDB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. GPT-5.1 web search integration is live and functional. 70 matches in DB with 1 live match (CSK vs PBKS, ipl2026_007). Do NOT trigger /api/schedule/load?force=true as it makes expensive GPT-5.1 web search calls. WebSocket and chart console warnings are cosmetic only.

data_verification.live_match_teams: Chennai Super Kings vs Punjab Kings
